/usr/bin/ar qc libhealth_reminder_notifications.a CMakeFiles/health_reminder_notifications.dir/health_reminder_notifications_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/health_reminder_notifications.dir/src/notifications/notification_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/health_reminder_notifications.dir/src/notifications/notification_window.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libhealth_reminder_notifications.a
